data.description:
## Why
rebar's Jira bridge (reconciler) needs a first-class onboarding/configuration UX: detect/collect Jira credentials (JIRA_URL, JIRA_USER, JIRA_API_TOKEN, JIRA_PROJECT), validate them, and persist config. Surfaced by audit ticket peal-agony-lumen, whose plugin-era jira-credential-helper.sh was kept as reference groundwork (scripts/jira-onboarding-reference/).

## What
- Promote scripts/jira-onboarding-reference/jira-credential-helper.sh back into src/rebar/_engine/ and wire a dispatcher arm (credentials preflight) + docs.
- Pair with 'rebar bridge-probe' (jira-capability-probe.py) for an end-to-end onboarding check.
- Persist Jira config via the .rebar/config.conf path (read-config.sh).
- Move the reference test back into tests/ and add coverage for the wired command.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Interactive/structured credential onboarding reachable via the rebar CLI and documented
- [ ] Jira config persisted + read by the reconciler
- [ ] Helper promoted out of scripts/jira-onboarding-reference/ with tests in tests/
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Implement Jira onboarding & configuration flow for rebar
